Bernard is exactly 5, so he doesn't meet the age condition. Even though his weight is 13 kg (which is more than 12), since his age isn't over 5, he's out. 3. **Vincent**: Age is 9, weight is 11 kg. Age is over 5, yes. But weight is 11 kg, which is less than 12. So Vincent doesn't qualify either. 4. **Gwen**: Age is 8, weight is 15 kg.
